description: A new public park has been completed. An operator must add the new assets (benches, playground equipment) to the city's asset management system.

nodes.task_description: Receive a list of new assets installed at the 'Willow Creek Park'.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the list of new assets and their types.

nodes.task_description: For each new asset, create a new entry in the asset management database, including its location, type, and installation date.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully adds all new assets to the database.

nodes.task_description: Schedule the first preventive maintenance inspection for the new assets according to their standard maintenance plan.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sets up the future maintenance schedule for the new park assets.
